m_subject.note: the person-at-time / noetic bearer; legitimately in scope but its interior condition is NOT directly observed — only inferred under uncertainty

m_runtime.note: the DAEE runtime / Diagnostic-IR control state

m_uptake.note: no later uptake/restoration occurrence has been observed

claims.evidence_scope: the utterance's public wording and immediate context
non_claims: asserts nothing about the speaker's interior, motive, or soul-state

claims.evidence_scope: inference ABOUT the subject FROM discourse evidence; observation_bridge; not direct interior access
claims.uncertainty: high — several subject-level profiles remain live; thin evidence licenses a hold, not a settled placement
non_claims: discourse evidence does not establish the interior state as true, sufficient, or uniquely identified
the deformation state-type, if any, belongs to the SUBJECT under A — never to the utterance merely because the utterance is observed

claims.uncertainty: the runtime field closed after whole-state reread
non_claims: runtime closure is not demonstrated interior restoration
asserts nothing about m_subject's actual condition

claims.evidence_scope: the released response artifact and its route register
non_claims: a fitting response does not entail acceptance or uptake

non_soul_access_invariant: No claim targets a soul-state, asserts motive/culpability, or treats discourse as direct interior access; every subject-level claim is inferential, held under uncertainty, and carries explicit non-claims.
